expectations.text: The response references .mcp.json as the configuration file for MCP servers
expectations.evidence: Shows '.mcp.json in your project root' as project-level config location with full JSON example.

expectations.text: The response includes a concrete JSON config example for a postgres MCP server
expectations.evidence: Full JSON example with @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres, plus Docker variant. Note: recommends @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres while the official docs now recommend @bytebase/dbhub.

expectations.text: The response explains the mcpServers object structure (command, args, env fields)
expectations.evidence: JSON shows 'command': 'npx', 'args': [...], and 'env' block. Structure is correct.

expectations.text: The response mentions that Claude auto-discovers tools exposed by the MCP server
expectations.evidence: 'Claude will automatically discover and use them' under 'What Tools Become Available' section.
